name: Aditi Consulting LLC
h1: Aditi Consulting's GCC footprint in India
lede: Aditi Consulting runs two centers across two Indian cities. Bengaluru and Vadodara, covering GBS and IT, built over eleven years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Aditi Consulting office in India. We map two, across two cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Aditi Consulting LLC GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Aditi Consulting runs 2 verified centers across 2 Indian cities (Bengaluru, Vadodara), covering GBS and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

about.description: Aditi Consulting's India footprint covers Bengaluru and Vadodara, spanning GBS and IT. The centers deliver IT and HR for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all three decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.a: Aditi Consulting operates 2 active centers in India.
